fixVerification: Blocking bug fixed: profileStore.ts:59 changed `status: 'loaded'` to `status: 'error'` in saveProfile() catch block — verified in git diff b613b6c (commit b613b6c7dc57008022b12f9835ad1c82cf0b3c5b)
3 unit tests added in profileStore.test.ts covering: (1) create API failure sets error status, (2) update API failure sets error status, (3) non-Error rejection uses generic message
Tests use correct ProfileDTO type fields (created_at/updated_at snake_case matching the actual interface definition)
Error handler also correctly sets isEditing: false alongside status: 'error'
All 101 tests pass including the 3 new ones; typecheck and lint pass
Worker correctly identified and fixed a type mismatch in test file (ProfileDTO field names) that would have caused typecheck failure
Prior review blocking item at line 59 (status: 'loaded' → 'error') is fully resolved
summary: The fix feature fully addresses the blocking failure from foundation-profile-frontend. The saveProfile() catch block now correctly sets status: 'error' instead of status: 'loaded' on API failure (profileStore.ts:59). Three well-structured unit tests verify error state for create failure, update failure, and non-Error rejections. All validators (typecheck, lint, test) pass. The non-blocking issues from the prior review (cancelEditing not restoring values, incomplete edit mode wiring) remain but are out of scope for this fix feature and do not block functionality.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker fixed a ProfileDTO field name mismatch (snake_case vs camelCase) that was not documented anywhere. The ProfileDTO type uses created_at/updated_at but this convention differs from standard camelCase used elsewhere in the codebase. This could trip up future workers.
